title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Magora Systems Limited
body: "Application number 5350  Applicant Thinking Fish Limited objected to the name used by Magora Systems Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Magora Systems Limited is changed to 14890712, Ltd. "
